import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './About.css'; const About = () => { return (

About Greyline Accountants Ltd.

Strategic finance for agency leaders

Make More and Keep More

We partner with established agencies to bring structure and discipline to their finance function.

Growth introduces complexity, headcount increases, and cash flow tightens. Financial decisions carry more weight. Without strong oversight, performance becomes harder to control.

Greyline Accountants Ltd. embeds structured reporting, tax strategy and forward planning into your agency, ensuring that growth strengthens profitability and stability.

The result is clarity at leadership level and confidence in every major decision.

Our Approach

Complete Finance Coverage

Bookkeeping, reporting, and advisory aligned under one roof so nothing gets missed.

Transparent Pricing

One clear monthly fee. No hourly billing. No surprise invoices.

Direct, Ongoing Access

Slack, Zoom, and scheduled reviews so finance conversations happen when they need to.

Clear, Live Reporting

Real time numbers that help you make the right decisions.

Proactive Financial Guidance

We help you interpret the numbers and take action.

Ready to work with us?

Schedule a call to discuss how we can help your business

Schedule a Call
); }; export default About;
